calculationNotes.salesCounts: Uses line item quantity summed by SKU over 7/30/90 days.
calculationNotes.averageSalesPrice: Simple average of order line original unit price by SKU.
calculationNotes.stockNow: Sums inventory level on_hand quantities across locations.
calculationNotes.netMargin: Uses average sales price multiplied by 0.8 before subtracting cost price.
calculationNotes.segment: KIDS if SKU ends 02, 04, 06, or 08. All other SKUs are WOMENS.
